title: ophrys fusca subsp. bilunulata
intro: Ophrys fusca subsp. bilunulata, also known as the two-horned bee orchid, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The plant has been reported to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, likely due to its flavonoid and phenolic content. It can be prepared into herbal teas or infusions for consumption, as well as being used in tinctures or extracts for medicinal purposes.
